title: 石門國小資訊科技駕駛艙：答題快打 Suno 音樂包
license: 僅放入阿凱老師帳號中可用於本遊戲發布的 Suno Pro／Premier 音檔。

lobby.sunoPrompt: Instrumental only. Cheerful Taiwanese elementary school technology lab, playful chiptune and marimba, clean synth bass, warm optimistic melody, 100 BPM, seamless 30 second game menu loop, no vocals, no sound effects.

battle.sunoPrompt: Instrumental only. Energetic child-friendly cyber classroom battle music, bouncy 8-bit arpeggios, light electronic drums, bright synth lead, playful and focused, 128 BPM, seamless 45 second game loop, no vocals, no aggressive or dark mood.
battle.license: 阿凱老師 Suno Pro 帳號產生，可用於本遊戲發布。

ultimate.sunoPrompt: Instrumental only. A short 8-second ultimate-combo stinger for a child-friendly technology quiz fighting game: instant bright synth rise, three rhythmic digital impact hits, sparkling chiptune arpeggio, heroic marimba flourish, clean final power chord. Energetic, playful, triumphant, no vocals, no lyrics, no scary or aggressive mood.
ultimate.license: 阿凱老師 Suno Pro 帳號產生，可用於本遊戲發布。

victory.sunoPrompt: Instrumental only. Joyful elementary school coding mission complete theme, uplifting 8-bit melody, marimba and handclaps, proud but gentle, 105 BPM, 12 seconds, no vocals.
victory.license: 阿凱老師 Suno Pro 帳號產生，可用於本遊戲發布。

retry.sunoPrompt: Instrumental only. Gentle encouraging game retry cue for children, soft electronic bell melody, optimistic rising ending, 8 seconds, no vocals, never sad or scary.
